text: a drink made by steeping leaves or other plant material in hot water
original_text: Tea is a drink made by steeping leaves or other plant material in hot water.

text: true teas come from the Camellia sinensis plant
original_text: True teas come from the Camellia sinensis plant.

text: tea types include black, green, white, oolong, and many herbal infusions
original_text: Tea types include black, green, white, oolong, and many herbal infusions.

text: tea flavor depends on plant type, processing, temperature, steeping time, and additions
